/cases/freight-optimization.title: Cutting Freight Costs 18% for a Consumer-Goods Shipper | Transportation & Logistics Case Study
/cases/freight-optimization.description: A manufacturer's freight bill was climbing faster than sales while service slipped, and its planners were routing shipments by hand. Optimizing routes, loads and modes across the network took 18% out of the cost.

/cases/last-mile-optimization.title: Cutting Last-Mile Delivery Costs 30% for a Regional Carrier | Transportation & Logistics Case Study
/cases/last-mile-optimization.description: A regional carrier was losing money on the final leg of every delivery, with routes locked the night before. Letting routes adjust as the day unfolded cut the cost of each delivery by 30%.

/cases/airline-loyalty-redesign.title: Reviving a Regional Airline's Loyalty Program | Travel & Hospitality Case Study
/cases/airline-loyalty-redesign.description: A regional airline's frequent-flyer program had millions of members but few who cared. Rewards that fit each traveler nearly doubled the share of active members and lifted spend.

/cases/hotel-guest-experience.title: Restoring Personal Service Across a Hotel Group | Travel & Hospitality Case Study
/cases/hotel-guest-experience.description: As it grew, an upscale hotel group lost the personal touch that made its name. Giving every property one clear view of each guest lifted its recommendation score by 25 points.

/cases/automotive-ev-transition.title: Retooling a Components Line for Electric Vehicles | Automotive Case Study
/cases/automotive-ev-transition.description: A components supplier had to convert a line to electric-vehicle parts without a rough, expensive launch. A disciplined approach cut launch defects by 45% and lowered unit cost by 22%.

/cases/automotive-connected-vehicle.title: Turning Connected-Vehicle Data into Value | Automotive Case Study
/cases/automotive-connected-vehicle.description: A vehicle manufacturer was collecting data from its connected vehicles but doing little with it. Reading those signals cut warranty claims by 30% and opened a new service revenue line worth $9M a year.

/cases/automotive-supply-resilience.title: De-Risking Chip Supply and Recall Traceability | Automotive Case Study
/cases/automotive-supply-resilience.description: A components supplier kept losing production to chip and parts shortages and could not trace a suspect part quickly. Getting ahead of supply and tightening traceability cut line stoppages by 80%.

/cases/urban-master-planning.title: Phasing a Mixed-Use District for Stronger Returns | Urban Development Case Study
/cases/urban-master-planning.description: A mid-sized developer was trying to build an entire district at once and straining its balance sheet. Planning the district as a sequence of phases lifted projected returns by 18% and cut the capital it had to put at risk at any one time.

/cases/urban-smart-buildings.title: Cutting Building Operating Costs with Connected Data | Urban Development Case Study
/cases/urban-smart-buildings.description: A property owner was running its buildings blind, reacting to complaints and breakdowns. Using the data its buildings already produced cut operating costs by 22% and lifted tenant satisfaction.

/cases/urban-capital-projects.title: Delivering Capital Projects On Time and On Budget | Urban Development Case Study
/cases/urban-capital-projects.description: A developer kept learning about delays and cost overruns only after they had happened. Getting ahead of change orders and schedule slips lifted on-time delivery to 95% and avoided $11M in overruns.
